methodology: Pricing scraped from public websites where available (Direct Funeral Services, 1Last, Embrace, Serenity Casket partials). Traditional parlours (Singapore Casket, Ang Chin Moh, Trinity, Nam Shan) do not publish — estimates derived from Google review claims, ST/CNA 'cost of dying' articles 2023-2025, and MOH death-cert records (~24,000 SG deaths p.a.). Wholesale casket manufacturers (Millennium, TSTee, Sinseeseng, Roger & Sons, White Artz, Soon Teck, Zhen Feng) sourced from JB/SG industry directories and trade-import data — they do not retail to bereaved families directly. Eco-paper category from The Eco Casket public catalogue. Direct-cremation bypass and DIY-community alternatives sized via NEA Mandai data. specialisation_for_cell entries identify the specific (segment x need) pairs each competitor credibly contests — every entry max 120 chars, no copy-paste boilerplate.

categories.sg_traditional_parlour: Incumbent SG full-service funeral parlours that bundle casket cost into S$8K-S$15K packages (Singapore Casket, Ang Chin Moh, Trinity, Nam Shan, Casket Fairprice).
categories.sg_transparent_funeral: SG funeral providers with publicly listed package pricing (Direct Funeral Services, 1Last, Serenity Casket, Embrace) — full-package, NOT casket-only DTC.
categories.wholesale_casket_mfr: JB/SG casket manufacturers selling B2B to parlours — wholesale, not direct-to-bereaved (Millennium Casket JB, TSTee, Sinseeseng, Roger & Sons, White Artz, Soon Teck, Zhen Feng).
categories.eco_paper_casket: Eco / paper-based casket alternatives (The Eco Casket — Finoboard biodegradable).
categories.direct_cremation_bypass: NEA Mandai direct cremation with no parlour and no casket-purchase ritual.
categories.diy_community_alt: DIY family arrangements — WhatsApp coordination, charity referrals, no commercial casket purchase.

competitors.name: Singapore Casket Company
competitors.target_market: SG Chinese middle-to-upper families wanting full Lavender Street wake — casket bundled inside S$10K-S$15K package
competitors.primary_value_prop: Singapore's oldest funeral parlour (est. 1920) — multi-generational trust, casket cost folded into total package.
strengths: Full vertical from casket to cremation
weaknesses: Casket price hidden inside S$10K+ package — cannot be itemised
No public charity disclosure, no FSC certification, no PWM signal

specialisation_for_cell.note: Owns hearse fleet — same-day venue delivery via parlour pipeline, but only as part of full package

competitors.name: Ang Chin Moh Funeral Directors
competitors.target_market: SG Chinese families seeking dignified mid-premium funeral — caskets bundled into S$9K-S$13K package
competitors.primary_value_prop: 5th-generation family funeral director with dignity / aftercare positioning — caskets remain a hidden line item inside total package.
weaknesses: No public casket pricing — markup invisible to family
Excludes cost-conscious / pre-arrangement buyers via S$10K+ entry

specialisation_for_cell.note: Bereavement-counselling brand voice — but only via paid full-service intake, not casket-only

competitors.name: Trinity Casket
competitors.target_market: SG Christian / multi-faith families wanting pastor-led wake — caskets bundled into S$7K-S$9K package
competitors.primary_value_prop: Christian-leaning funeral director with church-venue logistics — casket cost embedded in package.

competitors.name: Nam Shan Casket
competitors.target_market: SG Hokkien/Teochew/Cantonese families wanting clan-association traditional rites — casket bundled in package
competitors.primary_value_prop: Dialect-rooted funeral director specialising in traditional clan rites — casket markup hidden in total quote.
weaknesses: Chinese-only intake, no English digital flow

competitors.name: Casket Fairprice
competitors.target_market: SG cost-conscious heartland families wanting budget Buddhist/Taoist 1-3 day wake — package-bundled
competitors.primary_value_prop: Budget challenger publishing entry package prices — but caskets still bundled inside packages, not retailed separately.
strengths: Lowest published starting package in SG
weaknesses: Casket itself still not priced as a line item
Brand-name lawsuit risk vs NTUC FairPrice

specialisation_for_cell.note: Publishes package starting at S$1,388 — competes on entry price even if casket not itemised

competitors.name: Direct Funeral Services
competitors.target_market: SG value-seeking families of all faiths wanting transparent-priced funeral package — full-service, not casket-only
competitors.primary_value_prop: SG's best-known transparent-pricing funeral package brand — but caskets remain bundled, not separately retailable.
strengths: Top SEO on funeral package SG
weaknesses: Casket cost not itemised inside package

specialisation_for_cell.note: Publishes package matrix online — closest SG competitor on consumer-rights / transparency narrative
All-in package promise reduces upsell pressure but still bundles the casket inside

competitors.name: 1Last
competitors.target_market: English-first NextGen SG families (35-55) pre-planning or coordinating parent funeral online
competitors.primary_value_prop: Digital-first SG funeral package booker with online quote-to-booking flow — packages, not casket-only DTC.

specialisation_for_cell.note: Pre-need digital flow with public package prices — closest SG competitor on senior digital pre-planning

competitors.name: Serenity Casket
competitors.target_market: SG Chinese Buddhist/Taoist families wanting value full-service wake with semi-public price anchors
competitors.primary_value_prop: Mid-market Buddhist/Taoist specialist with WhatsApp-first intake and semi-public package tiers — bundled, not casket-only.
weaknesses: Casket itself not priced as line item

competitors.name: Embrace Life
competitors.target_market: SG pre-planners and bereaved seeking 'celebration of life' modern funeral with curated aesthetics
competitors.primary_value_prop: Celebration-of-life full-package brand with curated floral and modern venue — caskets bundled inside.
weaknesses: High price point excludes budget segment

competitors.name: Millennium Casket (JB)
competitors.target_market: B2B casket wholesaler supplying SG / MY parlours and funeral directors — not direct to bereaved family
competitors.primary_value_prop: Large JB-based casket factory supplying Buddhist / Taoist / Christian caskets to SG and MY parlours at wholesale cost.

specialisation_for_cell.note: Wholesale cost ~RM1,500-RM5,000 — exposes the markup parlours charge, but no consumer-facing channel

competitors.name: TSTee Casket
competitors.target_market: B2B casket / coffin wholesaler supplying parlours across Singapore and Peninsular Malaysia
competitors.primary_value_prop: Established JB casket / coffin factory with Chinese-style and Western-style SKU range, sells via parlour channel only.

competitors.name: Sinseeseng Casket
competitors.target_market: SG-based B2B casket wholesaler supplying parlours and traditional funeral directors
competitors.primary_value_prop: Long-running SG casket supplier serving parlour channel — predominantly Chinese-tradition SKUs.

competitors.name: Roger & Sons (SG carpentry)
competitors.target_market: SG urban-fallen-tree salvage carpentry — bespoke wood furniture, occasional made-to-order caskets via referral
competitors.primary_value_prop: Bukit Timah carpentry famous for SG urban-tree salvage — bespoke caskets only on direct family request.
weaknesses: Not a casket-first brand — slow lead time

specialisation_for_cell.note: Strongest SG local-timber narrative — competes on sustainability craft, but lead time blocks bereavement urgency
Genuine SG carpentry workshop — closest competitor on local-build authenticity

competitors.name: White Artz Casket
competitors.target_market: Christian and white-casket-preference parlours across SG / MY — wholesale supply
competitors.primary_value_prop: MY casket factory specialising in white / Christian-style SKUs supplied via parlour channel.

competitors.name: Soon Teck Casket
competitors.target_market: SG B2B casket supply to traditional Chinese parlours — Buddhist / Taoist heavy SKU mix
competitors.primary_value_prop: Long-running SG casket supplier to Chinese-tradition parlours with custom rites-aligned builds.

competitors.name: Zhen Feng Casket
competitors.target_market: SG B2B casket supply with mixed multi-faith SKU range serving small / mid parlours
competitors.primary_value_prop: Mid-size SG casket supplier with multi-faith SKU range — wholesale only, parlour-channel exclusive.

competitors.name: The Eco Casket
competitors.target_market: Eco-conscious SG / MY families wanting Finoboard biodegradable paper casket for cremation
competitors.primary_value_prop: Biodegradable Finoboard paper casket for cremation — published price, eco-narrative, MY-based DTC + parlour partnerships.
weaknesses: Paper casket aesthetic not for traditional families

specialisation_for_cell.note: Closest eco-alternative — biodegradable Finoboard paper, but not FSC-certified solid timber
Publishes per-casket RM price online — rare for eco-casket category

competitors.name: Direct Cremation via NEA Mandai
competitors.target_market: Secular / cost-minimising SG families choosing Mandai direct cremation with no wake and no commercial casket purchase
competitors.primary_value_prop: Absolute-minimum-cost lawful farewell — Mandai cremation with NEA-supplied basic casket; no wake, no parlour markup.
weaknesses: Basic casket — no FSC / aesthetic story

specialisation_for_cell.note: Government-published cremation fee — anchors floor price for cost-minimising buyers
Government route has no upsell — but no service layer either
ComCare can subsidise direct cremation — overlaps Passage's free-casket pathway for no-NOK / means-tested

competitors.name: DIY Family WhatsApp + NEA Booking
competitors.target_market: Tech-comfortable SG families self-managing direct cremation via messaging apps, declining all commercial vendors
competitors.primary_value_prop: Pure DIY: WhatsApp family group + Google Photos + direct NEA cremation booking — minimum-cost, zero vendor.
weaknesses: Grief + logistics burden falls entirely on family

specialisation_for_cell.note: Zero upsell because zero vendor — but family absorbs all logistics burden

competitors.name: Singapore Hospice Council (referral pathway)
competitors.target_market: Hospital / palliative-care social-worker referrals to dignity-of-death support, not commercial competitor
competitors.primary_value_prop: Singapore Hospice Council advocates dignity-of-death and channels social-worker referrals — Passage charity partner, not competitor.
weaknesses: Not a commercial casket / funeral provider

specialisation_for_cell.note: Listed Passage charity partner FY2024 — referral pathway for hospital-led free-casket eligibility
Hospice helpline complements Passage's 24/7 line for compassionate-basis referrals

competitors.name: SASCO Senior Citizens' Home
competitors.target_market: No-NOK / abandoned senior referrals — Passage charity partner channel, not commercial competitor
competitors.primary_value_prop: SASCO welfare home for low-income / no-NOK seniors — referral pathway for free-casket eligibility through Passage.

specialisation_for_cell.note: Passage FY2024 charity partner — strongest no-NOK / abandoned-senior referral funnel

competitors.name: Metta Welfare Association
competitors.target_market: Buddhist welfare-aligned referrals for dignity-of-death and means-tested family support
competitors.primary_value_prop: Buddhist welfare association — Passage FY2024 charity partner, channels means-tested referrals for free-casket programme.

specialisation_for_cell.note: Passage charity partner — closes the loop on verified % to charity narrative

competitors.name: Singapore Funeral Services
competitors.target_market: SG SEO-driven 'any faith' funeral booker — caskets bundled inside packages
competitors.primary_value_prop: SEO-aggregator brand competing on Google visibility and 24-hour hotline — bundled package, not casket-only.
weaknesses: Upsell gap to typical S$8K out-the-door

competitors.name: Funeral Solutions SG
competitors.target_market: SG aggregator brokering quote-compare across 5-8 partner parlours — full-package, not casket-only
competitors.primary_value_prop: Aggregator broker connecting families to partner parlours — semi-public package pricing, no owned fulfilment.
weaknesses: Re-routes to incumbents that hide casket cost

competitors.name: Embrace (pre-need digital)
competitors.target_market: SG digital-first pre-planners (40-60) seeking online pre-need funeral packages with public pricing
competitors.primary_value_prop: Digital pre-need SG funeral package booker with public pricing — full-package focus, not casket-only.

specialisation_for_cell.note: Public pre-need package pricing — competes for digital-native senior pre-arrangement segment

competitors.name: Hospital Medical Social Worker pathway (MSW-led)
competitors.target_market: Hospital MSW-coordinated discharge-and-funeral pathway for ComCare / no-NOK / unclaimed bodies
competitors.primary_value_prop: Public-hospital MSW pathway coordinates discharge-and-funeral logistics for unclaimed / means-tested cases — referral channel.

specialisation_for_cell.note: Hospital MSW arranges next-day discharge — Passage's 3hr delivery beats this for time-critical cases
MSW already gates means-tested referrals — Passage partners with MSWs to deliver free-casket SLA

competitors.name: Expat repatriation funeral directors (Mortuary Express SG / FSI)
competitors.target_market: Expat / foreign-national families requiring embalming + repatriation + cross-border casket compliance
competitors.primary_value_prop: Specialist expat repatriation FD handling embassy liaison, embalming and IATA-compliant casket export.
weaknesses: Casket markup hidden in repatriation bundle

specialisation_for_cell.note: Owns repatriation logistics — but Passage 3hr local delivery still faster for the SG-side casket leg
Semi-public range — closest competitor for the expat segment but casket cost still bundled

competitors.name: Singapore Buddhist Federation Funeral Services
competitors.target_market: SG devout Buddhist families wanting temple-coordinated monk-led rites — caskets bundled, member-aligned
competitors.primary_value_prop: Federation-backed funeral coordination linking monk-led rites and temple venue — caskets bundled inside coordination.

competitors.name: ComCare (MSF)
competitors.target_market: Means-tested SG households eligible for MSF ComCare assistance including funeral / burial subsidies
competitors.primary_value_prop: MSF ComCare scheme provides means-tested funeral / burial subsidies to low-income / no-NOK SG households.
weaknesses: Not a commercial provider — relies on partner FDs

specialisation_for_cell.note: Upstream eligibility gate — Passage stacks free-casket programme on top of ComCare-confirmed cases
